description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for a Python package that lints, tests, and publishes to PyPI. The workflow triggers on push and pull request events, ignoring docs/ paths. It has a concurrency group that cancels in-progress jobs. The workflow consists of three jobs: lint, test, and publish. The lint job checks code style with pylint on ubuntu-latest. The test job runs tox tests on multiple Python versions and operating systems. The publish job builds and publishes to PyPI on tag pushes, requiring successful test job completion.
